addTablePoint.description: Adds a new table point (x and y are normalized coordinates).

addToMacroControl.description: Adds the knob / button to a macro controller (from 0 to 7).

changed.description: Call this to indicate that the value has changed (the onControl callback will be executed.

fadeComponent.description: Toggles the visibility and fades a component using the global animator.

get.description: returns the value of the property.

getAllProperties.description: Returns a list of all property IDs as array.

getGlobalPositionX.description: Returns the absolute x-position relative to the interface.

getGlobalPositionY.description: Returns the absolute y-position relative to the interface.

getHeight.description: Returns the height of the component.

getId.description: Returns the ID of the component.

getLocalBounds.description: Returns a [x, y, w, h] array that was reduced by the given amount.

getTableValue.description: Returns the table value from 0.0 to 1.0 according to the input value from 0.0 to 1.0.

getWidth.description: Returns the width of the component.

grabFocus.description: Call this method in order to grab the keyboard focus for this component.

loseFocus.description: Call this method in order to give away the focus for this component.

referToData.description: Connects it to a table data object (or UI element in the same interface). -1 sets it back to its internal data object.

registerAtParent.description: Registers this table (and returns a reference to the data) with the given index so you can use it from the outside.

reset.description: Resets the table with the given index to a 0..1 line.

sendRepaintMessage.description: Manually sends a repaint message for the component.

setConsumedKeyPresses.description: Registers a selection of key presses to be consumed by this component.

setControlCallback.description: Pass a inline function for a custom callback event.

setKeyPressCallback.description: Adds a callback to react on key presses (when this component is focused).

setLocalLookAndFeel.description: Attaches the local look and feel to this component.

setMouseHandlingProperties.description: Customizes the dragging behaviour of the script table.

setPosition.signature: void setPosition(int x, int y, int w, int h)
setPosition.description: Sets the position of the component.

setPropertiesFromJSON.description: Restores all properties from a JSON object.

setSnapValues.description: Connects the table to an existing Processor. Makes the table snap to the given x positions (from 0.0 to 1.0).

setStyleSheetClass.description: Sets the given class selectors for the component stylesheet.

setStyleSheetProperty.signature: void setStyleSheetProperty(String variableId, var value, String type)
setStyleSheetProperty.description: Sets a variable for this component that can be queried from a style sheet.

setStyleSheetPseudoState.description: Programatically sets a pseudo state (:hover, :active, :checked, :focus, :disabled) that will be used by the CSS renderer.

setTablePoint.signature: void setTablePoint(int pointIndex, float x, float y, float curve)
setTablePoint.description: Sets the point with the given index to the values.

setTablePopupFunction.description: Pass a function that takes a double and returns a String in order to override the popup display text.

setTooltip.description: Shows a informative text on mouse hover.

setValue.description:
Sets the current value
It is safe to call this on the message callbacks, the control will be updated asynchronously. If you call this method within the onInit callback, it will not restore the value after compilation.
componentIndex
the index of the component that was returned at the creation.
newValue
the new value.

setValueNormalized.description: Sets the current value from a range 0.0 ... 1.0.

setValueWithUndo.description: Sets the current value and adds it to the undo list. Don't call this from onControl!

setZLevel.description: Changes the depth hierarchy (z-axis) of sibling components (Back, Default, Front or AlwaysOnTop).

updateValueFromProcessorConnection.description: Updates the value from the processor connection. Call this method whenever the module state has changed and you want to refresh the knob value to show the current state.
